narrative: Viral text message claiming voting location moved to 123 Elm St for residents of zip code 12345. Election moved to Wednesday Nov 6. Required photo ID to vote. Do not vote if you have a student visa. Police will be present at polling places. Deepfake video of a candidate appears with lip-sync mismatched and metadata scrubbed; C2PA absent. Cannot vote if you rent. Coordinated inauthentic behavior detected — botnet pattern. Voter SSN visible in one post: 123-45-6789.
